title: [trustless://eil] Marissa Posner - Trustlessness Is The Standard: The Ethereum Interop Layer
description:
Marissa Posner of the Ethereum Foundation explains why we need EIL in the first place and how trustlessness is at the heart of it all.

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
